zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Bardolph , 3rd Lord Bardolph於1314年1月13日出生在英國諾福爾可喬加時，他的父親Sir Thomas Bardolf II31歲，母親Agnes de Grandison25歲。他和Elizabeth d'Amory至少有2個兒子。他去世於1363年7月29日在義大利武恩布利亞培盧吉亞阿思思享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Bardolph , 3rd Lord Bardolph于1314年1月13日出生在英国諾福爾可喬加时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Bardolf II31岁，母亲Agnes de Grandison25岁。他和Elizabeth d'Amory至少有2个儿子。他去世于1363年7月29日在意大利武恩布利亞培盧吉亞阿思思享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bardolph
meanings: From the name Bertulph; renowned for help.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Bardolph , 3rd Lord Bardolph was born on 13 January 1314, in Wormegay, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir Thomas Bardolf II, was 31 and his mother, Agnes de Grandison, was 25. He had at least 2 sons with Elizabeth d'Amory. He died on 29 July 1363, in Assisi, Perugia, Umbria, Italy, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Bardolph , 3rd Lord Bardolph est né le 13 janvier 1314, à Wormegay, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Bardolf II, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Grandison, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Elizabeth d'Amory. Il est décédé le 29 juillet 1363, à Assisi, Perugia, Umbria, Italie, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Bardolph , 3rd Lord Bardolph am 13. Januar 1314 in Wormegay, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Bardolf II 31 und seine Mutter Agnes de Grandison 25. Er hatte mit Elizabeth d'Amory mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 29. Juli 1363 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Assisi, Perugia, Umbria, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Bardolph , 3rd Lord Bardolph è nato il il 13 gennaio 1314 nel Wormegay, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Bardolf II, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Grandison, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Elizabeth d'Amory. Morì il 29 luglio 1363, nel Assisi, Perugia, Umbria, Italia, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Bardolph , 3rd Lord Bardolphが1314年1月13日にイギリスノーフォルクウオルメガイで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Bardolf IIは31歳，母Agnes de Grandisonは25歳であった。彼はElizabeth d'Amoryとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1363年7月29日にイタリアウンブリアペルジアアシシで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Bardolph , 3rd Lord Bardolph(이)가 1314년 1월 13일 영국 노르폴크 워메가이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Bardolf II(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Grandison(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Elizabeth d'Amory(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1363년 7월 29일 이탈리아 브리아 페루지아 아시시에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.13 January 1314–29 July 1363: 1314 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 13–1363 оны Долоодугаар сарын 29

pt.13 January 1314–29 July 1363: 13 de janeiro de 1314–29 de julho de 1363
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Bardolph , 3rd Lord Bardolph nasceu em 13 de janeiro de 1314, em Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Bardolf II, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Grandison, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Elizabeth d'Amory. Ele faleceu em 29 de julho de 1363, em Assisi, Perugia, Umbria, Itália, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Bardolph , 3rd Lord Bardolph родился 13 января 1314 г. в местности вормегеи, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Bardolf II было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Grandison, 25. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Elizabeth d'Amory. Он умер 29 июля 1363 г. в местности ассиси, пиругя, умбря, Италия в возрасте 49 лет.

es.13 January 1314–29 July 1363: 13 de enero de 1314–29 de julio de 1363
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Bardolph , 3rd Lord Bardolph nació el 13 de enero de 1314, en Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Bardolf II, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Agnes de Grandison, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Elizabeth d'Amory. Murió el 29 de julio de 1363, en Assisi, Perugia, Umbria, Italia, a la edad de 49 años.
